clickToMarkHoliday: Click on a working day to mark it as a holiday. Click on a holiday to remove it.
configureWorkingDaysAndHolidays: Configure working days and holidays for accurate project scheduling
description: Manage working days and holidays for accurate project scheduling
importHolidaysDescription: Upload a CSV or JSON file with date and reason columns to bulk import holidays
reasonPlaceholder: e.g., National Holiday, Company Shutdown, Special Event
